calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title to Property/Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Stephen M. Williams, Esq. for Plaintiff: Leonard C. Gage and Reginald T. Gage.
Plaintiff's Witness: Leonard C. Gage, was sworn and direct examined.
EXHIBIT 1 - Joint Tenancy Deed, dtd. 08-20-86----------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendants: T.D Ellington and Earlie B. Knockum for the REAL PROPERTY fully listed in details in the Judgment.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the EXHIBIT in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
